title: IDA Pro
html:
The disassembler/decompiler Yahir used inside REMnux for the spring-2025 CS reverse-engineering homework on busybox_1_21_1. Heavy multi-screenshot session May 19–20 2025 — function browser, struct creation, rodata cross-references, pseudocode view of procps_scan / procps_read_smaps. The single most-documented dev tool from Yahir's coursework era.

TL;DR

  • 18 inbound citations, virtually all from the May 19 → May 20 2025 IDA marathon (~14 screenshots in 30 hours).
  • Target binary: BusyBox 1.21.1 — single Linux multitool, ideal teaching binary because of its breadth + reachable size.
  • Workflow: function browser → cross-reference → struct creation → string panel scan → pseudocode export.
  • Focal functions analyzed: procps_scan, procps_read_smaps, read_cmdline, bb_progress_*, md5_crypt, i64c/to64, ascii_to_bin.
  • Forms the static-analysis half of Yahir's spring-2025 security stack alongside malware analysis lab (dynamic) and Wireshark (network).

Key facts

  • REMnux as host. Linux analysis distro pre-loaded with IDA + companion tools.
  • Discord help layer. 2025 05 19 screenshot 2025 05 19 at 3 25 28 pm dc0919a3 — "Ethanol's PID-offset hint" via Discord channel — class-collab evident.
  • Custom struct creation. 2025 05 19 screenshot 2025 05 19 at 4 20 29 pm 3a4a8569 — Yahir defines procps_scan_t as a custom IDA type to make pseudocode readable.
  • Strings panel as recon. Multiple screenshots (2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 2 57 45 pm 690719ee, 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 2 58 02 pm 5302c03e, 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 2 58 37 pm 9cf95633) of strings-panel scanning — classic RE entry point.
  • Pseudocode export = the final deliverable. 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 3 27 50 pm 9f0f6022 = polished pseudocode for the assignment.

Source summaries

All 13 IDA-marathon screenshots:

  • 2025 05 19 screenshot 2025 05 19 at 3 18 52 pm a7016caa — readdir64 loop disasm
  • 2025 05 19 screenshot 2025 05 19 at 3 20 14 pm 250848d2 — getpagesize/xzalloc prologue
  • 2025 05 19 screenshot 2025 05 19 at 3 25 28 pm dc0919a3 — Discord PID hint
  • 2025 05 19 screenshot 2025 05 19 at 3 48 53 pm d7bbee3b — Add Type / enum_51
  • 2025 05 19 screenshot 2025 05 19 at 4 13 01 pm 656b0b49 — function browser
  • 2025 05 19 screenshot 2025 05 19 at 4 20 29 pm 3a4a8569 — struct creation
  • 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 1 49 29 pm 4a65b4d4
  • 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 2 01 45 pm c2a9565c — aProcU_0 rodata
  • 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 2 57 45 pm 690719ee — strings 1
  • 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 2 58 02 pm 5302c03e — strings 2
  • 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 2 58 37 pm 9cf95633 — strings 3
  • 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 3 13 49 pm 457b8c06 — procps_scan_t struct
  • 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 3 27 41 pm f1211fca — pseudocode 1
  • 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 3 27 50 pm 9f0f6022 — pseudocode 2 (final)

Connections

  • busybox · remnux — adjacent tooling
  • reverse engineering · buffer overflow · webp cve — RE concepts
  • malware analysis lab · wireshark · network forensics — dynamic / network counterparts
  • cs coursework · osu — institutional context
  • python — adjacent scripting tool
